changes_from_base_run: Updated AUM to Dec-31-2025 actuals for BX, BAM, KKR, ARES, CG, TPG, OWL, MAN, STEP, PGHN, HLNE, ICP, ONEX, PAX, VCTR
Updated EQT AUM to year-end 2025 report (€270B total); added Coller Capital pending acquisition note
Updated PGHN AUM to $185B (full-year 2025 results; +21% YoY)
Updated ONEX AUM to $59.2B total / $43.9B fee-generating (Q4 2025 report)
Updated RPC (ex-P10) AUM to $29.4B fee-paying (Q4 2025); corrected ticker to RPC and updated firm name
CVC: updated FPAUM to €148B at Dec-2025; total AUM remains ~€215B estimate from H1 2025
BPT: no H2 2025 results available; AUM held at H1 2025 figure ($86.6B)
Eurazeo and Antin: no H2 2025 results published; H1 2025 figures retained
ADDED: Tikehau Capital (TKO.FP, Euronext Paris) — €52.8B AUM as of Dec-31-2025; pure-play alt, newly included
metadata.notes: AMK (AssetMark) excluded — delisted Nov 2024 after GTCR acquisition; also a wealth platform, not alt AM. PHL (Petershill) excluded — delisted Dec 2025. SCU (Sculptor) excluded — acquired by Rithm Nov 2023. PAG excluded — not yet publicly listed. 3i excluded — primarily balance-sheet investor, minimal third-party AUM. BIP/BNT excluded — managed vehicles within Brookfield, not independent managers. BN excluded — AM business fully transferred to BAM. GLP Capital Partners excluded — not publicly listed. Added beyond original expected list: CVC, Bridgepoint, Antin, Eurazeo, Onex, Ridgepost Capital (ex-P10), Vinci Compass, Tikehau Capital.

universe.inclusion_rationale: Largest publicly listed alternative asset manager globally. Total AUM $1,274.9B (+13% YoY); FEAUM $921.7B (+11% YoY); Perpetual Capital $523.6B (+18% YoY). Record DE of $5.57/share for full-year 2025.

universe.aum_note: Total AUM >$1T per annual report; Fee-Bearing Capital $603B (+12% YoY; 87% long-dated or perpetual). FRE $3B (+22% YoY). FRE margin 58% for full year.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Major pure-play listed alt manager. Fee-Bearing Capital $603B. Raised >$110B in 2025. 15% dividend increase announced. New CEO Connor Teskey effective 2026.
Major pure-play alt manager; credit-dominant model with retirement services integration (Athene). ~25% YoY AUM growth. On track to $1T AUM by late 2026.
Major diversified alt manager. $744B total AUM from 10-K filing: PE $229B, Credit $322B (incl. Global Atlantic), Real Assets $192B. Record $129B capital raised and $95B deployed in 2025.
Pure-play alt manager with credit-dominant model (65% of AUM in credit, $407B). 28.5% YoY AUM growth. Targeting $750B by 2028.
Major global alt manager. $477B total AUM: Global PE $164B, Global Credit $211B (+10% YoY), AlpInvest $102B. FRE $1.24B (record), 47% FRE margin. 8% YoY total AUM growth.

Diversified asset manager spanning traditional and alternative strategies. Total client assets $316.6B; AUM $313.8B. Partial-alt: majority of revenue from traditional AM; alternatives are a meaningful but minority segment. Record annual revenue >$1B in 2025.
Pure-play alt manager focused on permanent capital solutions. $307.4B AUM (+22% YoY). ~85% of management fees from permanent capital. Record $56B total fundraising in 2025. Revenue ~$2.9B.
Pure-play alt manager. $303B AUM (+23% YoY). $51B raised and $52B deployed in 2025. FRE $953M (+25% YoY), 45% FRE margin. AUM tripled since IPO 4 years ago.

universe.aum_note: EUR 270B total AUM / EUR 141B FAUM at Dec-31-2025 per year-end report. USD equivalent ~$295B at ~1.09 EUR/USD. Pending Coller Capital acquisition (USD 3.2B base, ~$50B AUM, expected close Q3 2026).
universe.inclusion_rationale: Largest European alt platform. €270B total AUM, €141B fee-generating AUM. Gross inflows €26B in 2025 (>2x prior year). Announced Coller Capital acquisition (secondaries) Jan 2026 — pro-forma AUM ~€320B on close.

Pure-play alt investment manager specializing in systematic and discretionary strategies. Record $227.6B AUM (+35% YoY). Net inflows $28.7B. Sixth consecutive year of market share gains. Run-rate management fee revenue $1,182M.

Pure-play private markets firm. $220B AUM (+22.9% YoY). $709B+ total capital responsibility (including advisory). Advisory/solutions-oriented model. Record Q4 revenue $586.5M. Key comparator for mid-scale alt managers.

universe.aum_note: Total AUM ~€200B+ (H1 2025 figure; H2 results pending). FPAUM €148B at Dec-31-2025 (+12% YoY). USD estimate ~$220B at ~1.09 EUR/USD applied to total AUM trajectory.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Amsterdam-listed pure-play alt manager (IPO Apr 2024). FPAUM €148B (beat analyst forecasts). €25.7B deployment in 2025; record €21.9B realisations. Credit, secondaries, and infra >50% of FPAUM.

Swiss-listed pure-play private markets firm. $185B AUM (+21% YoY). $30.2B gross new assets (incl. $4B from Empira acquisition). $26B realisations (+47%). 32% of AUM in evergreen programs. Pioneer of private markets royalties as fifth asset class.

universe.aum_note: Discretionary AUM $146.1B; total AUM and supervision $1.0T (includes non-discretionary advisory). Discretionary figure used for comparability.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Pure-play private markets firm. Discretionary AUM $146.1B. Total AUM+supervision $1T (discretionary + $871.5B non-discretionary). Q3 FY26 EPS $1.55 (beat estimate). Direct comparator for mid-scale alt managers.

universe.aum_note: Q3 trading statement confirms $127B AUM and $85B fee-earning AUM as of Dec-31-2025 (+11% YoY).
universe.inclusion_rationale: London-listed pure-play alt manager with 30+ years of experience. $127B AUM (+11% YoY), $85B FEAUM. Q3 fundraising $4.4B. Strategic partnership with Amundi for wealth distribution. Renamed from Intermediate Capital Group in 2025.

universe.aum_note: H1 2025 result; full-year 2025 results not yet published as of March 2026. AUM held at H1 figure.
universe.inclusion_rationale: London-listed pure-play mid-market alt manager. $86.6B AUM (+20% YoY at H1 2025). European PE, credit, US energy infra. Private credit AUM doubled since IPO to €14B. Six funds raising in H2 2025.

universe.aum_note: Total AUM $59.2B; fee-generating AUM $43.9B (+24% YoY); third-party AUM $50.5B. Previous run figure ($55.9B) was an undercount — updated to full AUM per Q4 2025 annual report.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Toronto-listed multi-strategy alt manager. $59.2B total AUM; $43.9B fee-generating (+24% YoY). Majority-alt due to significant balance-sheet co-investing ($8.7B investing capital) alongside fund management. Net income record $711M in 2025.

TARGET COMPANY. LatAm-focused pure-play alt manager. $52.6B AUM (+26% YoY). FEAUM $40.8B (+24% YoY). Pro-forma FEAUM $47.4B incl. announced acquisitions. FRE $202.5M (+19%). Record $7.7B organic fundraising in 2025. 2026 fundraising target $7B.

universe.aum_note: €52.8B AUM at Dec-31-2025 (+8% YoY). USD equivalent ~$57.5B at ~1.09 EUR/USD. Fee-paying AuM €42B (+6% YoY). EBIT of AM business €149.6M (+18%).
universe.inclusion_rationale: Paris-listed (Euronext compartment A, ticker TKO.FP) pure-play alt manager. €52.8B AUM as of Dec-31-2025. €10.5B gross inflows (record). €7.6B deployed (+35% vs 2024). Similar scale to PAX and Vinci Compass. Considering potential NYSE dual listing as of early 2026. Added this run — comparable scale and pure-play classification.

universe.aum_note: R$354.1B AUM reported. USD equivalent ~$50B at ~0.141 BRL/USD exchange rate. First full year as pan-regional platform post-Compass merger.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Nasdaq-listed LatAm-focused asset manager. Formerly Vinci Partners; rebranded to Vinci Compass July 2025 after Compass merger. R$354B AUM (~$50B). FRE R$80.4M in Q4 2025 (32.6% margin). Pending Verde acquisition expected to enhance margins. Direct PAX comparator. Majority-alt due to significant public equities and advisory revenue.

universe.aum_note: Fee-paying AUM $29.4B (+15% YoY). Previous run used estimated ~$40B total AUM — corrected to fee-paying AUM per Q4 2025 earnings. Ticker changed from PX to RPC effective Feb 11, 2026. Name changed from P10, Inc. to Ridgepost Capital, Inc.
universe.inclusion_rationale: NYSE-listed pure-play private markets solutions provider (rebranded from P10 to Ridgepost Capital, Feb 2026). Fee-paying AUM $29.4B (+15% YoY). Acquired Stellus Capital Management ($3.8B FPAUM) in 2026. Relevant size comparator for PAX.

universe.aum_note: €36.8B AUM at H1 2025 (+4% YoY). Full-year 2025 results not yet published. USD equivalent ~$40.1B at ~1.09 EUR/USD.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Paris-listed private markets manager with hybrid model (balance sheet + third-party AUM). €36.8B AUM at H1 2025; third-party AUM €27.5B (+10% YoY). Majority-alt due to significant proprietary balance sheet component (~€9.3B).

universe.aum_note: €33.0B AUM at H1 2025 (Jun-30); Q3 2025 activity update confirms good momentum. Full-year 2025 results not yet published. USD equivalent ~$36B at ~1.09 EUR/USD.
universe.inclusion_rationale: Paris-listed pure-play infrastructure specialist. €33B+ AUM. Fee-Paying AUM €21.8B (+6.2% YoY). Relevant peer for PAX's infrastructure franchise. Pure-play infra-focused model.

excluded_firms.reason: Delisted November 2024 following GTCR acquisition. Also a wealth management platform (TAMP), not an alternative asset manager. Primary business is turnkey asset management for financial advisors.
Delisted from LSE as of December 5, 2025. Goldman Sachs-backed GP stakes vehicle returned $921M to minority shareholders and went private.
Acquired by Rithm Capital in November 2023 for ~$720M. No longer independently publicly traded.
Not publicly listed. Considering Hong Kong IPO (~$2B raise) but no final decision as of early 2026.
Primarily a balance-sheet principal investor. Minimal third-party AUM (~£1.7B in unlisted infra funds). Investment model is direct proprietary investing, not fee-generating fund management.
Transferred 100% of asset management business to BAM in 2025. Remaining entity is a diversified holding company. Alt-AM economics fully captured in BAM (FIRM-002). Including BN would double-count.
Insurance/annuity capital solutions entity within Brookfield ecosystem. Not an independent asset manager. Capital flows to BAM strategies.
Managed vehicle (LP) within BAM's infrastructure franchise, not an independent asset manager.
Not publicly listed. Asia Pacific-focused alt manager specializing in logistics, digital infrastructure, and renewable energy. Private entity under GLP Group.
